content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY, GUNUPUR-765022, Dist- Rayagada, Odisha India OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIET/Exam/2025/ |5 91 Date: - 30/12/2025 NOTICE This is for information of all the students of the following Programme of GIET University, passed out in the academic year 2024 — 2025 that those who have not taken their Degree / Provisional Certificate & Grade Sheets are required to apply for the same by submitting the prescribed application form along with photo copy of the Clearance form before 31.03.2026. After that a PRESERVATION FEES of Rs. 500 per year will be charged. SI. No Name of the Course Batch 1. B.Sc(Ag) 2020 — 2024. - ¥ B. Tech 2020 —2024. . M.Tech 2022 —2024. 4, B.B. A 2021 —2024 5.
